highlights.description: Period-appropriate terminology for character data (Station, Orders, Allegiance)
New `augmented/` subpackage for modern demo data (email, phone, risk levels)

added.description: `Station` type with social rank hierarchy (Smallfolk, Knight, Lord, Great Lord, Royal)
`LifeStatus` type for character status (Living, Deceased) based on series finale
`Title` type with categories (Governance, Military, Religious, Academic, Commerce)
`Orders` slice for formal organizations (Night's Watch, Kingsguard, Small Council, etc.)
`Allegiance` type for feudal relationships (Liege, SwornTo)
`Resource` type for organization assets by category
`CharacterStation` map linking characters to their social rank
`CharacterStatus` map linking characters to living/deceased status
`CharacterTitles` map linking characters to their formal titles
`CharacterOrders` map linking characters to order memberships
`CharacterAllegiance` map linking characters to feudal relationships
`OrganizationResources` map linking organizations to their assets
`augmented.Character` type embedding base character with Email and Phone fields
`augmented.Resource` type embedding base resource with RiskLevel (1-5 scale)
`augmented.Organization` type with AreaCode, Phone, and Domain fields
`augmented.GetCharacters()` returning characters with demo contact info
`augmented.GetOrganizations()` returning organizations with demo contact info
`augmented.GetAugmentedResources()` returning resources with risk levels
`augmented.GetCharactersByOrganization()` for grouping characters
`augmented.GetCharactersByStation()` for grouping characters by rank
`augmented.HighRiskResources()` and `CriticalResources()` filter functions

tests.description: `TestStations`: verify station constants and character mappings
`TestOrders`: verify orders list and character memberships

highlights.description: Unified Cobra CLI (`got`) replacing 5 separate command binaries
Comprehensive unit tests for characters, organizations, and demo data generation

breaking.description: CLI commands moved from separate binaries to unified `got` command. Install with: `go install github.com/grokify/gameofthrones/cmd/got@latest`

added.description: `got` CLI with Cobra for unified command interface
`got show characters` command with `--query` and `--format` flags
`got show organizations` command with `--query` and `--format` flags
`got salesforce` subcommands: create-accounts, create-contacts, create-cases, delete-accounts, delete-contacts
`got pipedrive` subcommands: create-orgs, create-people, get-persons, get-org-fields
`got ringcentral build` command with `--output`, `--pretty`, and `--from-file` flags
GoDoc comments for all exported types and functions
Named constants: `csvColumnCount`, `areaCodeStride`, `phoneNumberStart`, `defaultFallbackDomain`

changed.description: Improved panic messages with descriptive context
Use empty struct for set membership in `acsOrgs` map (zero memory)

removed.description: ~60 lines of commented-out dead code in `characters.go`

tests.description: `TestGetOrganizationForUser`: test family name to organization mapping
`TestGetDemoOrganizations`: verify area codes and phone generation
`TestGetDemoCharacters`: verify unique phone numbers and emails

documentation.description: Expanded README with CLI Tool section and installation instructions
Added library usage examples for characters, organizations, and demo data
Updated CRM integration sections for new CLI commands
Added data reference tables for organizations and family mappings

added.description: golangci-lint badge to README

fixed.description: Lint errors: unchecked error return values in cmd packages

highlights.description: Embedded CSV data with `Characters()` function - no external file dependencies

added.description: `Characters()` function returning all characters from embedded CSV data
Embedded `characters.csv` using Go's `//go:embed` directive

infrastructure.description: Update Go test versions in CI

changed.description: Disable golangci-lint due to `typecheck` false positives (golangci/golangci-lint#2912)

infrastructure.description: Add Go v1.20.x to CI test matrix

added.description: README badges for CI, lint, Go Report Card, and pkg.go.dev
Dependabot configuration for Go modules and GitHub Actions
golangci-lint configuration

infrastructure.description: Add Go v1.18 to CI test matrix

highlights.description: Initial release with Game of Thrones character and organization data

added.description: 85 Game of Thrones characters from TV series with actor names
31 organizations (houses, groups, locations) with family name mappings
Demo data generation with fictitious phone numbers and email addresses
Salesforce CRM integration for creating Accounts, Contacts, and Cases
Pipedrive CRM integration for creating Organizations and Persons
RingCentral Embeddable Voice contact data export
SCIM-compatible user format using `goauth/scim` types
